scenario_label: Rapid-onset urban flooding, central Jakarta, 90-minute window
context_note: Tropical downpour overwhelms drainage in the Tegal Sari kampung, Manggarai underpass area, and Tebet. 12 reports submitted by responders across ~1.5km radius. Severity range 2-4, one elderly evacuation case, recurring electrical hazards. Designed to exercise the synthesis tier on a realistic mid-difficulty case.

reports.severity_rationale: Mid-shin floodwater on residential alley, no structural damage visible, residents moving items but not in distress.
reports.immediate_action: Monitor water levels; advise residents to move valuables to second floor; prepare evacuation gear.
reports.routing_rationale: Low severity, no compound hazards, high confidence.

reports.severity_rationale: Water rising past shin to knee; sagging low-voltage line visible above pedestrians; one child in group.
reports.immediate_action: Move pedestrians away from sagging wire; do not wade beneath it; cut local power if safely accessible.
reports.routing_rationale: Compound hazard: rising water plus electrical.

location.label: Tegal Sari Block 5, Jl. Tegal Sari V

reports.severity_rationale: Knee-high water on side street, one abandoned motorcycle partially submerged, no people visible.
reports.immediate_action: Mark abandoned vehicle location for later recovery; survey adjacent buildings for trapped residents.
reports.routing_rationale: No people in danger; routine flood damage.

location.label: Tegal Sari Block 5, Jl. Tegal Sari V

reports.severity_rationale: Water now at waist level; downed power line touching water surface; elderly woman visible on rooftop signaling for help.
hazards_visible: downed live power line in water
reports.immediate_action: DO NOT enter water; request power utility immediate disconnect; deploy boat or ladder rescue from upwind side.
reports.routing_rationale: Severity 4, trapped elderly, active electrical hazard.

reports.severity_rationale: Underpass fully flooded; motorcycle submerged with rider visible on adjacent raised platform; two adults stranded.
reports.immediate_action: Block both entrances to underpass; deploy rescue boat for stranded persons; check submerged motorcycle for trapped rider.
reports.routing_rationale: Possible trapped rider in submerged vehicle, severity 4.

reports.severity_rationale: Water now knee-to-thigh height in Block 3, confirming earlier rising trend; four residents wading toward higher ground.
reports.immediate_action: Direct residents to assembly point at Tegal Sari Masjid; survey for remaining residents in upstream alleys.
reports.routing_rationale: Third report this area in 35 minutes; situation evolving.

reports.severity_rationale: Ankle-deep water on commercial street; shop owner moving inventory; conditions stable.
reports.immediate_action: Monitor; no immediate action needed; assist business with sandbag placement if available.

reports.severity_rationale: Station plaza covered in knee-deep water; commuters stranded; children present in waiting group.
reports.immediate_action: Coordinate with KAI station staff to direct commuters to elevated waiting area; deploy bus shuttle from nearest dry station.
reports.routing_rationale: Vulnerable groups (children + elderly) in flooded transit hub.

location.label: Tegal Sari Block 7, Jl. Tegal Sari VII

reports.severity_rationale: Partial collapse of perimeter wall into floodwater; strong current visible; image quality fair due to rain.
reports.immediate_action: Cordon off collapsed wall area; warn upstream households of debris flow risk; survey for displaced residents.
reports.routing_rationale: Lower confidence on image; structural damage warrants cross-check.

location.label: Tegal Sari Block 5, Jl. Tegal Sari V

reports.severity_rationale: Follow-up at Block 5: rescue team on site, elderly woman safely extracted from rooftop; downed line confirmed live.
reports.immediate_action: Maintain electrical hazard cordon until utility disconnect confirmed; transport extracted resident to medical for check.
reports.routing_rationale: Follow-up to high-severity case; situation still active.

reports.severity_rationale: Traffic stopped on multi-lane junction; light flooding across lanes; no people in distress; vehicles relocating.
reports.immediate_action: Coordinate with traffic police for alternate routing; monitor for trapped vehicles in lower-lying lanes.
reports.routing_rationale: Traffic disruption only; no life-safety concern.

reports.severity_rationale: Water levels in Block 3 stabilizing; one adult with bandaged forearm sitting on raised step; minor slip injury reported.
reports.immediate_action: Triage minor injury; continue monitoring water level for renewed rise; coordinate evacuation logistics for vulnerable residents.
reports.routing_rationale: Fourth report this zone; pattern of stabilization warrants synthesis.
